title: Dream
tmdbOverview: With hard work and dedication on lock, a group of homeless men trains to compete in a global tournament — despite a cranky coach.
synopsis: Dream is a 2023 comedy, drama and k-drama film from South Korea. It carries a 6.5 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a +13 certification (AR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
